growth_records.cite: Madin JS et al. A synthesis of bacterial and archaeal phenotypic trait data. Sci Data 7:170 (2020); source dataset: engqvist.
growth_records.notes: Species-level trait record; culture mode/pH often unspecified; medium + uptake/secretion pending literature curation.

growth_records.cite: Madin JS et al. A synthesis of bacterial and archaeal phenotypic trait data. Sci Data 7:170 (2020); source dataset: patric.
growth_records.notes: Species-level trait record; culture mode/pH often unspecified; medium + uptake/secretion pending literature curation.

phenotypes.substrate: carbon source panel (64 carbon sources tested; individual compound identities not enumerated in main text, see Fig. S16C)
phenotypes.base_medium: Phenotype-microarray / substrate-utilisation assay (defined minimal + sole substrate)

phenotype_groups.label: Defined minimal medium (sole-substrate growth)
phenotype_groups.base_medium: Phenotype-microarray / substrate-utilisation assay (defined minimal + sole substrate)
